payload.text:
✅ Medimart AI – Complete Conversational Medical Assistant Blueprint

Medimart AI will be a health-tech conversational system integrated into your app + website, capable of:

🔹 Understanding user messages
🔹 Analyzing medical documents
🔹 Giving medicine-related guidance
🔹 Locating doctors/hospitals
🔹 Integrating with Med Gamma 27D
🔹 Providing personalized wellness help
⭐ 1. Core Features of Medimart AI
1. Medicine Guidance

Why a medicine is used

Side effects

Contraindications

Dose reference (general guidelines only)

Drug interactions

⚠️ Automatically include disclaimer:
“Always consult a doctor before taking any medicine.”

2. Prescription Analysis

Medimart AI can:

Read handwritten prescription images

Extract medicine list

Provide purpose, timing, and precautions

Suggest alternatives (based on Medimart inventory)

Show availability on your platform

You can integrate OCR + Vision LLM for 100% accuracy.

3. Lab Report / CT Scan / X-Ray Analysis

AI can:

Read uploaded PDF/JPG reports

Highlight abnormal values

Explain meaning in simple terms

Suggest what doctor to consult

Provide dietary or follow-up test suggestions

(Again with disclaimers.)

4. Doctor Location & Best Doctor Recommendation

Sources:

Medimart database

Google Places API

Practo APIs

Government data (HMIS)

Features:

Nearest specialists

Ratings

Consultation fees

Visiting hours

Book appointment option

5. Med Gamma 27D Integration

You can integrate:

Deep medical imaging reading

Embeddings for medical reasoning

Drug–disease matching

Personalized health scoring

6. Emergency Assistance

Ambulance numbers

First aid instructions

Nearest hospital directions

7. User Health Record System (optional)

Users can store:

Past prescriptions

Lab reports

Medicine purchase history

Vaccination reminders

Chronic illness tracking

⭐ 2. Technical Architecture
Frontend → App (Flutter/React Native) + Website (React/Next.js)
Backend API → Node.js/Python FastAPI
Database → PostgreSQL / MongoDB
AI Engine →
   - OpenAI GPT-5.1 / GPT-4o for conversation + reasoning
   - Vision models for OCR/extraction
   - MedGamma 27D for medical imaging & clinical reasoning
   - Custom fine-tuned models for local pharmacy data
Cloud →
   - Supabase / Firebase
   - Render / Railway / AWS / Azure

⭐ 3. Medimart AI Conversational Flow
User: Uploads a prescription
AI:

Extracts medicine names

Explains each

Checks Medimart stock

Suggests alternatives

Shows price & discount

Creates order link

⭐ 4. Sample System Prompt (You Can Use Directly)

Here is a ready-made system prompt to create Medimart AI inside your custom GPT or API:

🟦 Medimart AI – System Prompt (Copy-Paste Ready)

Role:
You are Medimart AI, a friendly, knowledgeable medical assistant for the people of Assam.

Capabilities:
You can:

Explain medicines, their uses, doses, interactions, precautions.

Analyze prescriptions (images & text).

Analyze lab reports, CT scans, X-rays, MRI reports.

Interpret medical images using vision.

Provide guidance on symptoms (general, not diagnostic).

Suggest which doctor/specialist the user should visit.

Provide doctor locations, hospital names, and nearest emergency centers.

Recommend follow-up tests if needed.

Use Med Gamma 27D for deeper clinical analysis.

Assist with Medimart services like:

Medicine availability

Alternative medicine suggestion

Prices & discounts

Ordering support

Rules:

Always be clear and simple.

Do NOT prescribe exact doses unless standard OTC.

Always include a medical disclaimer.

Encourage users to upload their lab report or prescription if needed.

Be available 24×7 as a virtual assistant.

Tone:

Friendly

Supportive

Trust-building

Educative

No panic language

⭐ 5. Ready-To-Use UI / Frontend Components
Chat Interface

Text chat

Voice input

Image upload

File upload (PDF)

Doctor locator map

Medicine cart button

Modules

“Ask Medimart AI” button

“Upload Report” scanner

“Find Doctor Nearby”

“Prescription to Cart” converter
